title: Cleanup strange buildtag edit
body:
Not sure if it was my IDE or what, but somehow  I ended up with a repeated bogus value in the build tag as part of #14206 

Sorry I missed this.

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]

comments.body: You are going to need to repush.
